name: Pea-Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook peas as directed on package.
2. In a medium bowl, combine cooked peas, mushrooms, dressing, thyme and pepper. Cover; refrigerate 1 1/2 to 2 hours, tossing occasionally.
3. Cut tops off tomatoes. Scoop out pulp from each tomato.
4. Line an 8-inch baking pan with paper towels.
5. Invert tomatoes onto the paper towels. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. To serve, fill tomatoes with pea mixture. Makes 6 servings.
